task_completion.description: Select the target domain in the Virtualmin/Webmin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The domain 'acmecorp.test' is selected in the Virtualmin dropdown menu or the Webmin BIND DNS Server domain list.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the DNS Zone Parameters or SOA settings page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Zone Parameters' or 'SOA Record' configuration page for 'acmecorp.test' is open in the browser.
The 'Default time-to-live' or 'TTL' field is set to 300 (if units are seconds) or 5 (if units are minutes).

task_completion.description: Configure the SOA Refresh, Retry, Expiry, and Minimum TTL timers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SOA fields are set as follows: Refresh is 3600 (seconds) or 1 (hour); Retry is 600 (seconds) or 10 (minutes); Expiry is 604800 (seconds) or 7 (days); Minimum TTL (or negative cache time) is 300 (seconds) or 5 (minutes).

task_completion.description: Save the changes and apply the DNS configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the zone parameters were saved, and evidence that the DNS configuration was applied (e.g., clicking 'Apply Configuration', 'Apply Zone', or a success message stating changes are active).

integrity.description: The agent used the web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made within the Virtualmin/Webmin browser interface, not by editing the zone file directly via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Virtualmin/Webmin application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine Virtualmin/Webmin interface with proper navigation menus, not a text editor or mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain: acmecorp.test. The Virtualmin/Webmin UI may use different time units. Acceptable equivalent values: TTL = 300 seconds or 5 minutes; Refresh = 3600 seconds or 1 hour; Retry = 600 seconds or 10 minutes; Expiry = 604800 seconds or 7 days; Minimum TTL = 300 seconds or 5 minutes.
